ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "mother_name" TEXT /* Mother's name */,
  "mother_job" TEXT /* Mother's job */,
  "mother_education" INTEGER /* Mother's education level (0-4) */,
  "father_name" TEXT /* Father's name */,
  "father_job" TEXT /* Father's job */,
  "father_education" INTEGER /* Father's education level (0-4) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., public, private) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the school */,
  "principal" TEXT /* Name and contact information of the school principal */,
  "school_board" TEXT /* School board or governing body responsible for the school */,
  "funding" TEXT /* Primary source of funding for the school (public, private, or mixed) */,
  "enrollment_size" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support service */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* ID of the school offering the support */,
  "support_type" TEXT /* Type of support (e.g., tutoring, counseling) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the support service */,
  "availability_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for when the support services are available */,
  "support_specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization for each support service (e.g., math, reading, counseling) */,
  "support_provider" TEXT /* Name and contact information of the organization or individual providing the support service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_support_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_support_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student participating */,
  "support_id" INTEGER /* ID of the support service */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date and time of participation */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of participation in minutes */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the student or instructor */,
  "support_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the support session (e.g., improved understanding, increased confidence) */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Whether follow-up support is needed */,
  "next_session_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next support session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_support_logs_support_id FOREIGN KEY ("support_id") REFERENCES educational_support ("support_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, teacher, counselor, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to (e.g., counseling, academic support) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role and responsibilities */,
  "supervisor" TEXT /* Name and contact information of the user's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of accessing the student data (e.g., grading, advising, research) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extracurricular_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extracurricular activity */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* ID of the school offering the activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the extracurricular activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)
